MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Balwantsihn Thakor DBA Kean Hotel is present. Represented by Kalpesh Gohill.
Attorney Michael Heath for the plaintiff.
Defendants John Jackson and Lynn Scribner are present.
Attorney Idin Kashefipour appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUL-01-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
